mapper.select: SELECT id, script_id, script_version_id, parent_step_id, step_type, name, sort_no, request_method, request_url, request_config, assertion_config, extractor_config, enabled, created_time, updated_time, created_by, updated_by, deleted FROM step_definition WHERE script_id = #{scriptId} AND script_version_id = #{versionId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_no ASC, created_time ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE step_definition SET parent_step_id = #{parentStepId}, step_type = #{stepType}, name = #{name}, sort_no = #{sortNo}, request_method = #{requestMethod}, request_url = #{requestUrl}, request_config = #{requestConfig}, assertion_config = #{assertionConfig}, extractor_config = #{extractorConfig}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND script_id = #{scriptId} AND script_version_id = #{scriptVersionId} AND deleted = 0
